subject: Zebstrika, a black-and-white striped horse-like Pokemon with jagged lightning-bolt markings, mid-gallop against a bright yellow and white electric background
description: A black-and-white horse Pokemon with jagged, lightning-bolt-shaped stripe patterns gallops across the card art. Its body is predominantly black with white markings, and bolt-like protrusions extend from its mane and ankles. The background is a vivid yellow burst of electric energy with white radial streaks suggesting explosive speed and charge. The pose is dynamic mid-gallop, conveying raw momentum.
foreground: black-and-white striped equine figure in motion
background: radial yellow electric burst with white streaks
